title: Gooey Weeknight Italian Speck Pasta
description: A quick and flavorful weeknight pasta dish featuring speck, cherry tomatoes, and gooey mozzarella cheese. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the speck and cook until crispy, about 2 minutes.
Remove the speck from the skillet and set aside.
Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cherry tomatoes to the skillet and cook until they start to release their juices, about 2 minutes.
Add the basil to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the pasta to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until it starts to soften.
Add the mozzarella cheese to the skillet and cook until it starts to melt.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the pasta hot, topped with the crispy speck and fresh basil.
